subcodes.first_line: Doth the Pen know? Say: Yea, by the Beauty of Eternity! Yet most men comprehend not that it soareth in the atmosphere [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هل القلم یعلم قل ای وجمال القدم ولکن الناس اکثرهم لایعلمون انه یطیر فی هواء
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @suffering and imprisonment, @station of the Manifestation of God, @spiritual transformation, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
